name: How's fault figured in work hearing loss cases?

mainEntity.name: How's fault figured in work hearing loss cases?

acceptedAnswer.description: Primarily employer negligence via OSHA non-compliance; worker non-use of protection may reduce but not bar comp.[1][8] Context: Strict liability for occupational diseases in most states.[1] Key factors: No assessments, ignored standards.[1] Practical guidance: Focus on employer failures; attorney proves liability.[7] Comp no-fault mostly.
